description_long: This object is a modern flat-panel computer monitor with a slim, rectangular display and a minimalist design. The front features a large, black screen framed by a thin bezel, giving it a sleek and contemporary appearance. The monitor is supported by a sturdy, rectangular pedestal stand that connects to the back of the display via a central arm. The rear surface is smooth and unadorned, with no visible buttons, ports, or branding. Both side profiles reveal the monitor's ultra-thin depth and the angular connection between the display and the stand. The overall construction suggests a combination of plastic and metal materials, typical of contemporary office or home monitors.
description: A slim, modern black computer monitor with a thin bezel and a rectangular pedestal stand. The design is minimalist, with no visible buttons, ports, or logos.
description_view_0: Front view showing the large, black display area with a thin bezel and the rectangular base of the stand.
description_view_1: Left side profile highlighting the monitor's ultra-thin depth and the angular connection to the stand.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a smooth, unmarked back panel and the central support arm attached to the stand.
description_view_3: Right side profile mirroring the left, emphasizing the slimness and the geometric stand structure.
attribute_screen_bezel_design: The bezel is thin, flat, and black, with a uniform width around the display and no visible texture or decorative elements.
attribute_stand_type: Rectangular pedestal stand with a flat, wide base and a straight, central support arm, all in a matte black finish.
attribute_button_placement: No physical buttons or controls are visible on any side of the monitor.
